title: Executive Order 5816—Power-Site Restoration No. 469, Montana
text:
So much of Executive order of October 20, 1910, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 155, as affects the lands hereinafter described, is hereby revoked:
Montana Meridian
T. 2 S., R. 20 E., sec. 32, lot 6.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
March 9, 1932.
